name: Lingsha
desc: The new Cauldron Master of the Xianzhou Luofu's Alchemy Commission is one perceptive and intelligent Vidyadhara healer.\nWith a keen sense of smell, she diagnoses ailments and calms minds with aromatic therapy.\nAdept at navigating complex social relationships, she can remain impeccably composed even when turmoil rages within.

1.name: Bloom on Vileward Bouquet
1.desc: Lingsha's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. When an enemy unit's Weakness is Broken, reduces their DEF by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Leisure in Carmine Smokeveil
2.desc: When using Ultimate, increases all allies' Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.name: Shine of Floral Wick
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Redolence from Canopied Banquet
4.desc: When Fuyuan takes action, restores HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Lingsha's ATK for the ally target whose current HP is the lowest.

5.name: Poise Atop Twists and Turns
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Arcadia Under Deep Seclusion
6.desc: While "Fuyuan" is on the field, reduces all enemies' All-Type RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When "Fuyuan" attacks, additionally deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Lingsha's ATK and <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Toughness Reduction to one random enemy. This prioritizes targets with both Toughness greater than 0 and Fire Weakness.

122201.name: Votive Incense
122201.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to one designated enemy target.
122201.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

122202.name: Smoke and Splendor
122202.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies and at the same time, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies. Fuyuan's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.
122202.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to all enemies and, at the same time, <color=#f29e38ff>restores HP</color> for all allies. Fuyuan's <u>action advances</u>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

122203.name: Dripping Mistscape
122203.desc: Inflicts "Befog" on all enemies. While in "Befog," targets receive <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> increased <u>Break DMG</u>, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nDeals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies, and at the same time restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies. Fuyuan's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>.
122203.simple_desc: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG taken</color> by all enemies, deals Fire DMG to all enemies, and at the same time, <color=#f29e38ff>restores HP</color> for all allies. Fuyuan's <u>action advances</u>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000014.name: Break DMG
10000014.desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

122204.name: Mistdance Manifest
122204.desc:
When using Skill, summons "Fuyuan," with an initial SPD of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and an initial action count of <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak>.
When taking action, "Fuyuan" launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to all enemies. Additionally deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK to one random enemy, and this DMG prioritizes targets that have both Toughness greater than 0 and Fire Weakness. Dispels <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> <u>debuff(s)</u> from all allies and restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Lingsha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>.
"Fuyuan's" action count can accumulate up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>. When the action count reaches 0 or when Lingsha is <u>knocked down</u>, "Fuyuan" disappears.
While "Fuyuan" is on the field, using Skill can increase "Fuyuan's" action count by <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak>.
122204.simple_desc: Using Skill summons "Fuyuan": When taking action, launches <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> and deals minor Fire DMG to all enemies. Additionally deals minor Fire DMG to one random enemy, prioritizing targets with both Toughness greater than 0 and Fire Weakness. Dispels 1 <u>debuff</u> from all allies, and <color=#f29e38ff>restores HP</color>.\nUsing Skill repeatedly will increase "Fuyuan's" action count.

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

122206.name: Attack
122206.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

122207.name: Wisps of Aurora
122207.desc: After using Technique, immediately summons Fuyuan at the start of the next battle and inflicts "Befog" on all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
122207.simple_desc: After using Technique, immediately summons Fuyuan at the start of the next battle and increases <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG taken</color> by all enemies.

1.point_desc: Increases this unit's ATK or Outgoing Healing by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Break Effect, up to a maximum increase of <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> respectively.
When using Basic ATK, additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

While "Fuyuan" is on the field and any ally character takes DMG or consumes HP, if a character in the team has their current HP percentage lower than or equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, "Fuyuan" will immediately launch the Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> against enemies. This does not consume Fuyuan's action count. This effect can trigger again after <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000004.name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.
